commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the hardcoded `"--"` comparison in `getCommandPathInternal` with the existing `FLAG_TERMINATOR` constant in `src/cli/argv.ts`.

PR surface: Source 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source issue: current main still has `arg === "--"` inside getCommandPathInternal while sibling helpers use FLAG_TERMINATOR. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, but the source path and linked issue are clear.

target.title: fix(cli): use FLAG_TERMINATOR constant instead of hardcoded "--" in getCommandPathInternal
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: `getCommandPathInternal` in `src/cli/argv.ts` uses a hardcoded `"--"` string literal to detect the flag terminator, while the `FLAG_TERMINATOR` constant already exists in `src/infra/cli-root-options.ts`.
- What changed: Replace the hardcoded `"--"` with the imported `FLAG_TERMINATOR` constant. Zero behavioral change — `FLAG_TERMINATOR` is defined as `"--"` (line 2: `export const FLAG_TERMINATOR = "--";`).

## Change Type

- [x] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Linked Issues

- Closes #83902

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** `getCommandPathInternal` hardcoded `"--"` instead of using `FLAG_TERMINATOR` constant (#83902).

**Real environment tested:** Node v22.22.0, Linux x86_64, PR branch checkout at commit 08e0edea.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=4 pnpm test -- src/cli/argv.test.ts

**Evidence after fix (terminal capture — source code verification):**

FLAG_TERMINATOR is defined in src/infra/cli-root-options.ts (console output):

$ grep "FLAG_TERMINATOR" src/infra/cli-root-options.ts
export const FLAG_TERMINATOR = "--";

FLAG_TERMINATOR is imported and used in src/cli/argv.ts (console output):

$ grep "FLAG_TERMINATOR" src/cli/argv.ts
  FLAG_TERMINATOR,
  if (!arg || arg === FLAG_TERMINATOR) {
  if (arg === FLAG_TERMINATOR) {

The getCommandPathInternal function now uses FLAG_TERMINATOR instead of the hardcoded "--" literal, matching all other terminator checks in the same file.

Test suite (console output):

$ OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=4 pnpm test -- src/cli/argv.test.ts

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  110 passed (110)
   Duration  456ms
exit code: 0

**Observed result after fix:** `getCommandPathInternal` now uses `FLAG_TERMINATOR` instead of hardcoded `"--"`. The constant has identical value. All 110 CLI argv tests pass. All other terminator checks in argv.ts already use `FLAG_TERMINATOR` — this is the last remaining hardcoded instance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt
